exercises.audioScript: You are not hungry, are you?
exercises.hindiScript: तुम भूखे नहीं हो, हो ना?
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: She is a doctor, isn't she?
I am right, aren't I?
He didn't come, did he?
You are not hungry, are you?
exercises.answer: You are not hungry, are you?

exercises.audioScript: This is not difficult, is it?
exercises.hindiScript: यह मुश्किल नहीं है, है ना?
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: You can do this, can't you?
You didn't do this, did you?
This is beautiful, isn't it?
This is not difficult, is it?
exercises.answer: This is not difficult, is it?

exercises.audioScript: You have eaten food, haven't you?
exercises.hindiScript: तुमने खाना खा लिया, लिया ना?
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: She likes this, doesn't she?
He was there, wasn't he?
You don't like this, do you?
You have eaten food, haven't you?
exercises.answer: You have eaten food, haven't you?

exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: You are not hungry, are you?
You go to school, don't you?
He sings well, doesn't he?
They will come, won't they?

exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: This is not difficult, is it?
She wakes up early, doesn't she?
We will meet, won't we?
I am right, aren't I?

exercises.audioScript: You didn't do this, did you?
exercises.hindiScript: यह तुमने नहीं किया, किया ना?
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: You have eaten food, haven't you?
We should leave early, shouldn't we?
You did this, didn't you?
You didn't do this, did you?
exercises.answer: You didn't do this, did you?

exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: They will come, won't they?
You are coming, aren't you?
She is a doctor, isn't she?
He was there, wasn't he?

exercises.audioScript: You go to school, don't you?
exercises.hindiScript: तुम स्कूल जाते हो, जाते हो ना?
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: I am right, aren't I?
He didn't come, did he?
You can do this, can't you?
You go to school, don't you?
exercises.answer: You go to school, don't you?

dictationPassage.text: You are not hungry, are you? This is not difficult, is it? You have eaten food, haven't you? They will come, won't they? I am right, aren't I?
dictationPassage.hindiTranslation: तुम भूखे नहीं हो, हो ना? यह मुश्किल नहीं है, है ना? तुमने खाना खा लिया, लिया ना? वे आएंगे, आएंगे ना? मैं सही हूँ, हूँ ना?
